title: aneilema koenigii
intro: Aneilema koenigii, also known as the Indian plectranthus or Coleus koenigii, is a type of herbaceous plant native to India and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, particularly for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Aneilema koenigii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as a natural remedy for various respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are typically used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
